inputs.label: Total Days
inputs.businessContext: Total number of days to be converted into weeks.

inputs.label: Days per Week
inputs.businessContext: Standard number of days per week for the conversion (e.g., 7 for calendar weeks, 5 for work weeks).

inputs.label: Decimal Precision
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for the primary output (weeks).

inputs.label: Show Remainder Days
inputs.businessContext: Set to 1 to include the breakdown of full weeks and remainder days; 0 to output only decimal weeks.

formulas.compute: function(inputs) { const totalDays = inputs.totalDays; let daysPerWeek = inputs.daysPerWeek; if (daysPerWeek <= 0) daysPerWeek = 7; const precision = inputs.precision; const showRemainder = inputs.showRemainder; const weeks = totalDays / daysPerWeek; const roundedWeeks = Math.round(weeks * Math.pow(10, precision)) / Math.pow(10, precision); const fullWeeks = Math.floor(totalDays / daysPerWeek); let remainderDays = totalDays - fullWeeks * daysPerWeek; remainderDays = Math.round(remainderDays * 1e6) / 1e6; return { primary: roundedWeeks, breakdown: showRemainder === 1 ? [fullWeeks, remainderDays] : [] }; }
